svg.title: BFF platform architecture flowchart
svg.desc: Program.cs composition root fans out to Setup, Middleware, Controllers, Services, Endpoints, and Observability layers. TokenRefreshService connects to external Entra v2. Dashed lines show cross-cutting dependencies.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in Program.cs composition root for a BFF?')
sendPrompt('What does PlatformAuthenticationSetup configure? Cookie + OIDC schemes explained.')
sendPrompt('What does PlatformCorsSetup configure and why must it run before UseAuthentication?')
sendPrompt('Explain PlatformAntiforgerySetup and its relationship to the Angular XSRF cookie.')
sendPrompt('How does PlatformRateLimiterSetup scope token buckets per TenantId?')
sendPrompt('What downstream health checks should PlatformHealthCheckSetup register?')
sendPrompt('What security headers should SecurityHeadersMiddleware set in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('How should CorrelationIdMiddleware propagate trace IDs through OpenTelemetry spans?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the BFF AuthController login, session, and logout flow with OIDC.')
sendPrompt('How should ProxyController forward requests including attaching the session token?')
sendPrompt('How does AntiForgeryController seed the XSRF cookie for Angular HttpClient?')
sendPrompt('How does TokenRefreshService handle refresh_token rotation server-side in the BFF?')
sendPrompt('How should GraphUserProfileService cache the /me endpoint and profile photo from Graph API?')
sendPrompt('What should the BFF HealthChecks probes verify about downstream services?')
sendPrompt('What should /health/live and /health/ready check in a BFF?')
sendPrompt('How should SPA fallback be implemented in .NET BFF to serve index.html for all unmatched routes?')
sendPrompt('How should SessionMetrics use OpenTelemetry Meter to track active sessions in the BFF?')
sendPrompt('What does Entra v2 return during token refresh and how should the BFF handle rotation?')
